description_long: This is a large, modern office building with a distinctive angular footprint and a dark, sleek exterior. The facade is dominated by horizontal bands of reflective glass windows, separated by thin, dark structural elements, giving it a uniform and contemporary appearance. The roof is multi-leveled and features a combination of flat and slightly sloped sections, with visible rooftop equipment such as HVAC units and railings. The building is elevated on a series of sturdy columns, creating a recessed ground level that may serve as an entry plaza or covered walkway. The overall design emphasizes geometric regularity and functional aesthetics, typical of late 20th to early 21st-century commercial architecture. No visible signage or decorative elements are present, reinforcing its utilitarian, business-oriented character.
description: A large, angular office building with dark glass facades, flat multi-level roof, and visible rooftop equipment. The structure is modern, elevated on columns, and features uniform window bands.
description_view_0: The front and main facade are visible, showing the angular shape, dark glass windows, and the building elevated on columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the flat roof sections, and rooftop equipment, with minimal facade detail.
description_view_2: Rear view showing more rooftop equipment and the continuation of the glass window bands, with the building's angular footprint evident.
description_view_3: Oblique view emphasizing the roof's geometry, the angular rear, and the supporting columns beneath the structure.
attribute_window_pattern: Continuous horizontal bands of rectangular windows, evenly spaced and repeated across all facades.
